content_hints.description: The stairs crumble beneath your feet as you descend, each step older and more weathered than the last, as if you are walking backward through geological time. By the bottom, the stonework has given way to raw, uncarved cavern. The air is ancient -- it tastes of mineral dust and something floral that has no business existing this far underground.
content_hints.read_aloud: > The stairs crumble beneath your feet as you descend, each step more weathered than the last, the stonework dissolving from carved blocks to raw, unworked cavern by the time you reach the bottom. The air down here tastes ancient—mineral dust and, impossibly, something floral, sweet and faint as a half-remembered dream.

hazards.name: Crumbling stairs (Dexterity save on final steps)

event_triggers: On entry: Your torch gutters. The gray light ahead is not fire, not magic -- it is ambient, as if the air itself remembers what daylight was.

content_hints.description: A 10-foot-square, 1-foot-thick secret door conceals this room, leading to a circular room with a 20-foot-high, domed ceiling. In the middle of the room is a gilded wooden throne with a cushioned seat and backrest covered in black velvet sewn with silver stars.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a vast, circular room with a 20-foot-high, domed ceiling, its interior bathed in a strange, sourceless light. Gilded wooden thrones sit in the center, and near the ceiling, four invisible sensors float, hinting at secrets hidden within this chamber.

loot.name: Petrified Wood Branch (arcane focus, worth 50 gp)
Agate Leaves (10 gp each, handfuls available)

event_triggers: On investigation: One petrified tree bears carvings in a language that predates Common, Dwarvish, and Elvish. A Comprehend Languages spell translates it as: 'We were here before. We will be here after. Remember us.'

content_hints.description: The environment is furnished with a small desk with some fake notes on non-existent transactions of illicit goods with made-up clients, some maps, and writing equipment, along with unlit lanterns, a bedroll, and a chest containing treasure.
content_hints.read_aloud: Among the petrified trees, a military camp occupies a cleared alcove with surgical precision. Tents of dark red hide are arranged in exact rows around a fire pit where flames burn without any visible fuel. Figures in ornate armor sharpen long silver blades that hum faintly, the sound felt more in your teeth than your ears.

npcs.name: Kress'tal
npcs.dialogue: You walk where you do not belong, groundling. This level is contested -- the shadow wyrm claims the deep chambers, and we intend to take them. You may pass, or you may fight beside us. Choose quickly; we do not negotiate with the indecisive.
npcs.notes: Githyanki knight. Scarred, pragmatic, fiercely disciplined. Leading a war party hunting a shadow dragon that lairs deeper in the level. Will accept temporary allies but trusts no one. Psionic abilities make deception nearly impossible.

event_triggers: On alliance: Kress'tal provides tactical information about the shadow dragon's lair and a githyanki war chant that grants resistance to fear for 1 hour.
On hostility: The entire camp mobilizes in 6 seconds. There are more warriors in the tents.

content_hints.description: A magically lit, circular chamber features a thin layer of blood-soaked sand covering the floor and stone buttresses supporting a 40-foot-high domed ceiling. This area has been turned into a gladiatorial arena where a pit fiend is trapped inside.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a magically lit, circular chamber with a thin layer of blood-soaked sand covering the floor and stone buttresses supporting a 40-foot-high dome. Ancient weapons jut from the sand at the pit's center, and the air carries a weight, as though a thousand unseen spectators lean forward in anticipation.

loot.name: Ancient Gladiator's Helm (grants advantage on saves vs. fear)

hazards.name: Arena wards (prevent teleportation within the pit)

event_triggers: On weapon drawn in arena: The invisible audience roars. For the duration of combat in the arena, critical hits deal maximum damage.
On victory: The roar becomes a chant. A hidden door in the arena wall grinds open, revealing a passage deeper.

content_hints.description: The dungeon level features a room with three beds lining the south wall, an empty cradle against the east wall, and squat wardrobes, play rugs, and children's desks. The door to this room is locked and can be picked with a successful DC 15 Dexterity check using thieves' tools.
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see seven standing stones rising from the cavern floor in a perfect circle, each one twelve feet tall, each carved with a single rune that pulses with pale light in a slow, repeating sequence—like a heartbeat measured in geological time. The air inside the circle is noticeably warmer, carrying a faint copper taste that coats your tongue. Small objects near the stones seem to shimmer at the edges, as if reality is thinner here, as if the boundary between what something is and what it could become has worn dangerously thin.

loot.name: Runestone Fragment (arcane focus, +1 to spell attack rolls)

hazards.name: Transmutation field (living creatures save or polymorphed for 1 hour)

event_triggers: On rune study (DC 17 Arcana): The sequence is a countdown. It has been counting down for nine thousand years. It has fourteen iterations remaining.

content_hints.description: The tunnel is covered with stone tiling and continues for 500 feet, being 10 feet wide and 10 feet in height.
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see the stone tiling stretching into an endless, narrow corridor, the air growing heavy and cold. Deep in the passage ahead, two points of violet light hang in the darkness, steady and unblinking, watching you.

hazards.name: Supernatural darkness (disadvantage on Perception in dim areas)

event_triggers: On light source destroyed: The shadows surge forward. All shadows in the room act immediately.
On passage through: The violet eyes at the end of the corridor blink and withdraw. The shadow dragon knows you are coming.

content_hints.description: The cavern is of impossible size, with a ceiling lost in darkness that even darkvision cannot penetrate. The floor is covered in a thin layer of ash that muffles footsteps to silence. In the center, coiled around a pillar of obsidian, a dragon made of shadow and hunger opens its eyes.
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see a cavern vast beyond reason, its ceiling swallowed by a darkness so complete that even magical light cannot find it. A thin layer of pale ash blankets the floor, muffling your footsteps to absolute silence.

loot.name: Shadow Dragon Scale (5 scales, rare crafting material)
Shadow Dragon's Hoard (1,800 gp in darkened coin)

hazards.name: Living shadow terrain (difficult terrain in darkness)

event_triggers: On combat start: The dragon does not roar. It simply stops pretending to sleep. The ash on the floor rises in a ring around the chamber, and the only exit seals behind a wall of solid darkness.
On githyanki alliance active: Kress'tal and two warriors arrive on round 3, attacking the dragon's flank. 'FOR VLAAKITH! FOR THE ASTRAL SEA!'
On defeat: The dragon dissolves into the ash. The obsidian pillar cracks, revealing a stairway spiraling downward. The shadows in the cavern do not leave -- they watch. They remember.
